records.text: World Mosquito Program Wolbachia intervention evidence for Aedes aegypti. Topic: Yogyakarta Wolbachia randomized controlled trial. Intervention type: wMel Wolbachia replacement. Metrics mentioned: 77%. Summary: World Mosquito Program Wolbachia method with Aedes aegypti.. Page excerpt: Wolbachia reduces dengue in Yogyakarta Wolbachia dramatically reduces dengue cases The randomized controlled trial in Yogyakarta, Indonesia showed a 77% reduction in dengue incidence. Wolbachia was introduced into local Aedes aegypti mosquitoes to reduce transmission of dengue, Zika, chikungunya, and yellow fever.
records.title: Wolbachia intervention evidence: Wolbachia dramatically reduces dengue cases
